child_spec.name: iter_0003_island4_more_dilations_again
child_spec.reasoning_summary: MINIROCKET iter_0002 (max_dilations 64) showed ZERO change: 0.4074 -> 0.4074 exact. Hardcoded saturation at this dataset T length. The real fix is quantile-based biases (deferred sprint). For now, try mutation on the classifier side: alpha grid 7-decade -> finer grid in the interesting range, class_weight 'balanced'->None to test class prior.
